title: OneMem networks config
description: Per-network deployment manifest for OneMem. Populated by scripts/deploy-contract.sh. Consumed by all OneMem packages + scripts + dashboard.

active.description: Default network when SUI_NETWORK env var is unset.

rpc_url.description: Full node JSON-RPC endpoint for this network.

suiscan_base.description: Suiscan base URL for object links (e.g. https://suiscan.xyz/testnet). Empty for local.

package_id.description: Current deployed onemem package ID used for Move call targets. Empty if not yet deployed on this network.

original_package_id.description: Original package ID used in Move object types, event types, and type tags. Equal to package_id before the first upgrade.

upgrade_cap_id.description: UpgradeCap for sui client upgrade — owned by deployer; rotate carefully.

deployer_address.description: Sui address that ran the publish.

tx_digest.description: Tx digest of the publish (or most recent upgrade).
